description: Video as a queryable local asset for AI agents — 47 tools for YouTube, social, and local media.
name: io.github.thatsrajan/vidlens-mcp

environmentVariables.description: YouTube Data API v3 key (optional — works without it via fallback scraping)
environmentVariables.name: YOUTUBE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Google Gemini API key for AI-powered visual descriptions (optional)
environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for optional speech-to-text transcription of imported non-YouTube sources
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: ScrapeCreators API key for optional social trend search across TikTok, Instagram, Threads, Pinterest, Reddit, and supported endpoints
environmentVariables.name: SCRAPECREATORS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Brave Search API key for optional social/generic video URL discovery
environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_API_KEY
